# GitKraken Insights Documentation

> GitKraken Insights documentation — analytics and reporting for your Git repositories and developer workflows.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started with GitKraken Insights](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights/): Learn how to request access, understand plan availability, and connect your data in GitKraken Insights.

## Documentation Pages

- [Dashboard Management in GitKraken Insights](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-dashboard-management/): Learn how to add and interpret key DORA and Pull Request metrics, arrange your layout, and use filters to analyze data on dashboards.
